backend/main.mo: Main actor defining all data types (Vehicle, Variant, Color, BlogPost, Promotion, Testimonial, Visit, etc.) and including MixinStorage for blob storage and MixinAuthorization for access control with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining OldActor and NewActor types for mediaAssets Map and a run function that currently performs no transformation (identity migration).
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and layouts describing their functionality and data flow.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga/Niaga, Promo, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and admin routes protected by AuthGuard, plus QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating and editing admin users with name, email, and principal ID fields, using useCreateAdminUser and useUpdateAdminUser hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with edit and delete actions, preventing deletion of the last admin user.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets, filtering for images with 'banner' in the filename and displaying them in a radio-group grid with blob URL previews.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, including delegation identity validation and token expiry checks before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: A table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, including confirmation dialogs for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: A grid component displaying media assets with preview thumbnails using blob URLs, supporting copy-to-clipboard for asset IDs and delete functionality with delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDFs with file validation, size limits, progress tracking, and delegation identity verification before upload.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses React hooks for form state management and mutation hooks for create/update operations.
Table component displaying all passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state message, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and sets default approved status and timestamp for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete action buttons. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. Truncates long URLs for display while showing full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, with date formatting in Indonesian locale. Includes loading and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is invalid or expired.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of 5 recent articles with navigation to individual blog post pages. Each article is rendered as a clickable card with an icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu overlay with site navigation links.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Button group selector for commercial vehicle variants that manages selection state and notifies parent component of changes via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image loaded from media assets with fallback to static generated image. Creates blob URLs from canister storage data with proper cleanup.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, operating hours, and live visitor statistics that auto-refresh every 15 seconds. Includes copyright and attribution.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays page-specific title, icon, background color, and subtext based on current pathname. Handles special styling for commercial vehicle pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel component displaying up to 8 family vehicles from the catalog using VehicleCard components. Shows loading state while fetching data.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles ('Mobil Niaga') using vehicle catalog data and VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main banner image from media assets or falls back to a static placeholder, creating blob URLs from canister storage data.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu for site navigation including vehicle categories, promo, testimonials, blog, and contact.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for vehicle products with counters, integrating native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of the first 4 featured vehicles from the catalog as 'Produk Unggulan' (Featured Products).
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Displays three key selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an official dealer with commitment to service.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector for vehicle variants and colors with button groups, notifying parent component of selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, visitors) with placeholder implementation returning zeros.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on admin users with authentication and network error handling, though backend methods are not yet implemented (returns stubs/empty data).
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting blog posts with error handling and toast notifications, though backend methods are stubbed and return empty/null data.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories, with all backend methods currently unimplemented and returning stubs or empty data.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data, though the backend method is not implemented and only logs a warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions, returning an empty array as the backend method is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data, though the backend method is not implemented and only logs a warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations, returning an empty array as the backend method is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting media assets with comprehensive error handling for authentication, network, and canister errors, including toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share counts and interactions (like, share), though all backend methods are unimplemented stubs returning zero counts.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for managing promotions (CRUD operations) with error handling for auth and network issues. Currently stubbed with empty implementations awaiting backend integration.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching public vehicle catalog data. Methods return empty/null as backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching website settings. Currently returns null as backend implementation is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: React Query hooks for testimonial CRUD operations with auth/network error classification and toast notifications. All operations are stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations with enhanced error handling (auth, network) and cache invalidation. Currently stubbed with empty implementations.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics with auto-refetch support. Only getVisitorStats is active; trend and page view endpoints are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now defers to PublicLayout. Kept for backward compatibility but performs no actual tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with error handling and toast notifications. Currently stubbed awaiting backend implementation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, including sidebar, charts, and semantic color tokens using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile menu, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, credit simulation, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and cache invalidation on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays contact form submissions in a sortable table showing name, email, message, and timestamp with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management interface with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating cache on successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and a list component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and a list component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh, including metrics cards, trend charts, and top pages analytics.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including contact info, social media URLs, operational hours, and banner images with image picker dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about, features, search, featured products, and articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for customer inquiries including vehicle interest, down payment, and tenor fields, plus contact information display.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public vehicle detail page showing vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, specifications, features, and interaction buttons (contact sales, credit simulation, brochure).
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public page displaying a grid of passenger vehicle cards, showing up to 8 published vehicles from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params, showing up to 8 published vehicles using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Shows detailed vehicle information including images, variants, pricing, specifications, and features with tabs; includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales and credit simulation.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page indicating the promotions section is under development with a message to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor; submits simulation requests to backend.
Placeholder page indicating the testimonials section is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all domain entities including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and determining MIME types (image/PDF).
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, managing sessionStorage persistence, and clearing sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides form validation functions (email, phone, URL, numeric, length checks) and delegation identity validation for authenticated operations with detailed error messages in Indonesian.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Implements visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/retrieval, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking pending feature requests to add debug logging to the deleteMediaAsset function for caller principal, user data, role detection, and enhanced error messages.
